name: Ham Topped Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cut up fully cooked smoked-extra lean ham (about 8-ounces)
1 package (10 ounces) frozen asparagus cuts, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Bake potatoes for about 1 hour or until tender.
3. In a 2-quart nonstick saucepan, mix cornstarch and milk.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils.
5. Stir in mustard, pepper, and cheese; cook until cheese is melted.
6. Stir in ham and asparagus; heat through.
7. To serve, cut potatoes lengthwise into halves. Serve sauce over potato halves.
6 servings.
